name: wokku
description: Deploy and manage apps on Wokku — the open-source Heroku alternative. 61 tools for apps, databases, domains, SSL, backups, and Bundle v2 box/shared-addon/dedicated-upgrade flows.

WOKKU_API_URL.title: Wokku API URL
WOKKU_API_URL.description: Wokku API endpoint (default: https://wokku.dev/api/v1 for managed cloud)

WOKKU_API_TOKEN.title: Wokku API Token
WOKKU_API_TOKEN.description: Your Wokku API token (create one at wokku.dev/dashboard/profile)
